name: codex-pro
description: Advanced Codex integration for Claude Code — drop-in upgrade for openai/codex-plugin-cc with ensemble pattern, hard timeouts, circuit breaker, and structured observability. v0.5.1: review v0.4 — heading-hardened (Step 3 system instructions rewritten to literal-token form so Codex reliably emits the ## Summary / ## Findings H2 + ### Finding N: H3 structure the result-file contract + e2e expect; issue #1). v0.5: /codex-pro:config (read-only consumer, profile-based config); review v0.3 / rescue v0.2 / adversarial-review v0.3 profile-aware (model / effort / max_time / focus_default resolved from ~/.codex-pro/profile.yaml global + project .codex-pro/profile.yaml; hardcoded defaults keep 100% backward compatibility). Fulfils Design constraint #5 partial landing.
